title: Post this мяу-мяу every week
description: This project adds meme "post this мяу-мяу every week" to the game.
body: This is my first mod, created with MCreator. This mod adds new ore, new metal, new tools, a new mob, etc.![All mod content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3baee430b6344ce4f97595dc522d9eb084c02ead.png)
